chunks.title: Call to Shine and Gathering of Nations
chunks.reason: A prophetic oracle calling Zion to rise and describing the influx of wealth and people from distant lands.

chunks.title: Restoration and Submission of Enemies
chunks.reason: A speech detailing the return of exiles, the rebuilding of walls by foreigners, and the submission of former oppressors.

chunks.title: Eternal Glory and Righteousness
chunks.reason: A concluding blessing describing the eternal light, peace, righteousness, and the transformation of the people into a mighty nation.
